auth_access_model: Many useful calls require a bearer token via PTAGIS_API_TOKEN or PTAGIS_API_KEY.

discovery_search.note: There is metadata discovery for reports and site codes, but not a broad search workflow.

metadata_schema.note: Validation-code and site metadata are exposed, but no general schema browser exists.

entity_lookup.note: Site-code access exists, but there is no canonical entity service.

identifier_crosswalks.note: Cross-system identifier mapping is not exposed.

abundance_assessment.note: Assessment or abundance workflows are not implemented here.

telemetry_passage.note: Site observations and interrogation files are implemented.

hatchery.note: MRR-oriented metadata exists, but hatchery workflows are not explicit.

harvest_fishery.note: Harvest and fishery workflows are not implemented.

genetics_gsi.note: Genetics and GSI workflows are not implemented.

package_metadata_export.note: No package or export workflow is implemented.

provenance_versioning.note: Revision metadata exists for validation codes, but the wrapper does not model a full provenance contract.

bulk_access_api_ergonomics.note: The API is structured, but useful calls are often token-gated and the wrapper is narrow.

blockers: Bearer-token requirements gate many high-value calls.
The current wrapper is intentionally narrow.
governance_constraints: Access should be treated as governance-aware rather than universally available.
